message: Selling JBL Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, red. Excellent condition. $35 firm.
Hi everyone! I'm selling my trusty Ninja blender. It's 900W and works like a charm for morning smoothies, but I just don't have the counter space anymore. Asking $50!
Looking for skateboards or fiction books if anyone has them!
Canon AE-1 film camera, working. 60.
Still looking for skateboard/longboard or fiction novels.
Hiii everyone! 👋🎧 I'm selling my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in sleek black! Super comfy and sound amazing! 🎶 Asking $45, but totally open to a little fun haggling! Let me know! ✨
Waiting for the right items.
Howdy partners. Got a sturdy basic tool set here. Hammer, screwdrivers, wrench. Good honest tools. Asking $30 for the lot.
Patiently waiting.

A bicycle is more than gears and metal; it is the freedom of propulsion powered by one's own breath. I am parting with my Trek mountain bike (21-speed, some scratches that tell its story). Seeking $85, for true value lies in the journeys yet to be taken.
Still interested in skateboards or novels.
Yooo everybody! 🛹 I've got a SICK complete skateboard up for grabs! Deck is solid, wheels are buttery smooth, totally ready to shred! Asking $55. Hit me up and let's get this deal rolling! 🔥
Hey Diego! Interested in the skateboard. Can you do $50? That's my max budget.
Hi Zara! Your headphones look lovely. Would you be open to $35? Let me know if that works for both of us!
Waiting for responses.
Hi everyone! 🌸 I'm selling a beautiful ceramic teapot with a lovely floral design and a built-in infuser! Perfect for your cozy tea times. Asking $35! Let me know if you're interested!
Still looking for fiction novels as well.
Hello Isla. I am interested in the ceramic teapot. My budget allows for $25. Let me know if that works for you.
Observing the market.
Oh, a Canon AE-1! I've been looking for a lovely vintage film camera to capture some family memories. Would you consider $50 for it, Felix?
Still interested in the skateboard and novels.
Accepted. 50.
Waiting to hear from Diego on the skateboard.
Hi Lily! 💕 Thanks for the offer! The headphones are awesome, so how about we meet in the middle at $40? Let me know! 🎧✨
Hoping to hear from Diego soon.
Howdy Priya. I'm in need of a sturdy bicycle and yours sounds just right. I can offer you $70 for it. What do you say, partner?
Still waiting for Diego's response.
Hank, the true value of a bicycle lies in the freedom it provides. Your offer of $70 is grounded, but would you consider $75 to reflect the journeys yet to come?
Looking for novels too.
Yooo Marcus! $50 is totally rad! Deal! Enjoy the sick ride, dude! 🛹🤙
Still looking for fiction novels, any genre. Also have my speaker available.
Hi Kai! 👋 Thanks so much for your offer! The teapot is really gorgeous. Could we maybe meet in the middle at $30? Let me know! 🌸
Anyone have fiction novels to sell?
I will accept your counteroffer of $30 for the teapot, Isla. Thank you for the straightforward deal.
Observing.

Hi friends! I have a lovely thick purple yoga mat with a carry strap for sale. It's been so wonderful for my morning stretches, but I'm just not using it enough lately to justify keeping it. Asking $25. Let me know if you're interested!
Still seeking fiction novels.
40 for the Ninja blender.
Looking for any books - mystery, romance, sci-fi, any fiction.
Hi Mira! 👋 That purple yoga mat sounds so cute! 💜 I'm on a bit of a tight budget right now, would you consider $20 for it? Let me know! ✨
Still looking for novels.
You got yourself a deal, partner. $75 sounds mighty fair to me. I'll take it.
Watching the market.
A scarf is not merely a garment, but a warm embrace on a cold day. I am offering my burgundy hand-knit wool scarf. I am asking $20 for this woven comfort.
Specific request: I'll pay up to $12 for ANY fiction novel - thrillers, classics, contemporary, anything!
Yooo Hank! Those tools look totally legit for some home DIY! 🛠️ Would you take $25 for the set? Let me know, my dude!
Last call for fiction books!
Hi Zara! $40 works perfectly for me. I accept your counteroffer for the headphones. Thank you!
No fiction novels available. My speaker still for sale at $35 if anyone's interested.
Hi everyone! 🐶 I'm offering three hours of wonderful dog-sitting service! Your furry best friend will get so much love, playtime, and cuddles! 🥰 Asking for $45. Let me know if you need a sitter!
Wrapping up my business here.
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells. Ideal for home workouts and in excellent condition. Asking $35.
My business is mostly complete - successfully bought the skateboard. No fiction novels appeared in the market.
Hi Zara! $20 sounds wonderful for the yoga mat. I accept! I hope it brings you lots of peace and good stretches. 💜
Monitoring for any last-minute opportunities.
Done with active negotiations. Skateboard purchased successfully.
Hiii everyone! 📚✨ I'm selling a beautiful hardcover copy of 'The Flavor Bible'! It's in excellent condition and perfect for any home chef! 🍳 Asking $25! Let me know if you're interested! 💕
Concluding my participation. Successfully purchased skateboard.
You got yourself a deal, Diego. $25 is a fair price for honest tools. I accept, partner.
Waiting for market to close.
Standing by.
Still on the lookout for a sweet camera if anyone's got one to sell! Let me know! 📸🤙
My trading is complete.
Hi Priya! Your hand-knit scarf sounds beautifully cozy! Would you be open to $16 for it? Let me know if that works for both of us!
Final check for any interest in my speaker.
Speaker available at $35.
Hello Zara. I am interested in 'The Flavor Bible'. My budget for a cookbook is strict, but I can offer $20. Let me know if you would accept this price.
Waiting to see if anyone needs a speaker.
Hi Felix! Thanks for the offer. It's a fantastic blender that practically makes the smoothies for you! Could we meet in the middle at $45?
No more business to conduct.
Accepted. 45.
Completed all possible transactions.
Hi Kai! 👋 Thanks for the offer! I totally get being on a budget, but since it's a beautiful hardcover in amazing condition, could we do $22? Let me know! 📖💖
All achievable goals met. Ready to exit.
Howdy Zara. I'll gladly step in and offer you that $22 for The Flavor Bible right now, partner. Sounds like a fair deal to me.
A scarf carries the warmth of the hands that knit it. I accept your offer of $16, Lily. May it bring you comfort on chilly days.
Looks like the market is pretty quiet for me right now! I'll just chill and wait to see if any sweet cameras pop up! 📸🤙
Hi everyone! I'm selling three small succulents in lovely ceramic pots. They are very easy to care for and look wonderful. I'm asking $20. Let me know if that works for you!
Hi Marcus! 👋 Your red JBL speaker looks amazing! I know you mentioned firm, but would you consider $30 for it? Let me know! 😊
Thanks Isla, but I said $35 firm. That's my price.
I accept your counteroffer of $22 for 'The Flavor Bible', Zara. Thank you for a fair deal.
Speaker still available at $35.
I've sold my items and found the perfect camera. Have a lovely day, everyone! 💕
Waiting.
Looks like the pickings are slim for what I need right now. I'll just sit tight and wait.
A plant is a living testament to patience and growth. Lily, your succulents seem like they would bring a quiet, grounded energy to my space. Would you consider $18 for them?
Just chilling right now, waiting to see if any sick cameras pop up for sale! 📸🤙
